query: Noa Lang thumb surgery recovery time Galatasaray Liverpool Champions League round of 16
a_issues: Content A does not clearly provide a specific recovery time in its top reliable results. BBC and Reuters confirm the thumb injury and surgery, but not a precise return timeline; only World Soccer Talk says 'several weeks,' which is less authoritative than BBC/Reuters and may be vague. One result also incorrectly refers to Lang as a defender/forward in different places across sources, though that does not affect the injury facts.
b_issues: Content B also lacks a clear, specific recovery time. Its source mix is weaker: Facebook, The Sun, and Yahoo aggregation are less reliable than Reuters/BBC. Most results only confirm surgery, not recovery timeline. It contains less factual detail overall and offers fewer strong primary/reputable sources. There is no clear contradiction, but the evidence base is thinner.
reasoning: A better enables a correct answer because it contains BBC and Reuters reports directly confirming that Noa Lang suffered a serious cut to his right thumb in the Champions League round-of-16 loss to Liverpool and underwent surgery in Liverpool. It also includes an additional result stating the injury was expected to keep him out for several weeks, which is the closest thing to recovery time present in either set. B confirms the same basic injury/surgery facts, but its sources are less reliable and give even less usable information about recovery time. Since the query asks about thumb surgery recovery time in this specific incident, A provides the stronger and more reliable factual basis, even though neither set gives a precise timetable.
